name: neural-weights-en-us
model_lineage: v1.1.0-relabel-consolidation / step 40000 â€” the v4.2.0 consolidation recipe FROM SCRATCH on a label-consistent mix (#511 affix-split relabel pass: the base corpus's ~467M monolithic street labels rewritten to agree with the affix shard, ending the 1,039:1 contradiction the #492 probe ladder isolated), with both anti-contradiction compensations reverted (synth-affix 17.0â†’2.0, affix tag weights â†’1.5). Ships with the locale head exported (locale_logits) driving the address-system conventions mask (#478 slice 1) â€” declared inference config addressSystemConventions:'auto'. Gate: docs/articles/evals/2026-06-11-v4.3.0-ship-gate.md; tokenizer 0.6.0-a0
phase: Stage 3 â€” v1.1 relabel: affix parity closed (data-consistency lever) + conventions layer slice 1

training.recipe: v1.1.0-relabel-consolidation: from-scratch 40k on v0.4.12 with the #511 affix-split relabel pass at load time (trailing USPS suffixâ†’street_suffix, leading directionalâ†’street_prefix, exact shard-builder parity, after augmentation), synth-affix 2.0 (natural weight â€” the contradiction it fought is gone), affix tag class-weights 1.5, gazetteer anchor + train-time choreography, CE-only, lr=1.5e-4, seed 42.

notes: v4.3.0 â€” the affix lever closed by data consistency, not weights. street_prefix 64.9â†’93.6, street_suffix 48.8â†’96.6 (int8, real-affix eval); on the new 193-row NAD-native eval the shipped v4.2.0 scored 18.2/8.9 F1 where this model scores 92.2/90.3 at P=100. First shipped slice of the conventions layer: the locale head (now exported as locale_logits) detects the address system and the decoder OBEYS it â€” fr forbids the USPS affix decomposition and pins the 5-digit postcode shape (fixes the FR leading-postcode digit-split this run's first gate caught). Consumers: pass addressSystemConventions:'auto' (the declared ship config) or omit for byte-stable pre-#511 behavior. Known follow-ups: po_box (deferred lever, both MontrĂ©al gate rows), FR region tail (27.6â†’16.2, unfloored), de/gb conventions rows as evidence arrives.

calibration.method: isotonic-regression (PAVA) over per-span softmax confidence; OPT-IN via core/decoder createCalibrator
calibration.note: calibration.json is the global table; calibration-per-locale.json carries per-locale tables (the global table under-serves DE/NL). Apply via @mailwoman/core/decoder's createCalibrator; default parse output is byte-stable when omitted.
